X4 Wi-Fi Transfer

Original Transfer is the SD manager. Chunked Resume is for large prepared cache folders such as /FCACHE/15D1296A. Wi-Fi passwords are never displayed by this page.
/

Drop files here or tap to browse

Uploads into the current folder; errors stay visible below

NameSizeActions
Safety: path traversal is rejected; delete asks for confirmation.
